en: Don't you know I could do this dance all night
ko: 내가 이 춤을 밤새 출 수 있다는 걸 몰라?

en: Ooh, what you doing? Don't know who you think that you're confusing
I be like, ooh, it's amusing You think I'm gonna fall for an illusion
It's amusing, it's amusing, it's amusing I be like, it's amusing, it's amusing, it's amusing
Was a time when that shit might've worked Was a time when I just threw a match and let it burn
Now I'm grown, I know what I deserve But still like dancing with the lessons I already learned
ko: 이제는 자라서 내가 받을 자격이 뭔지 알아

en: I already know your type Telling me the things I like
ko: 네 타입은 이미 알아, 내가 좋아하는 것들을 말해주고

en: Trying to make me ask for life Taking me for a ride
ko: 나를 평생 쫓아내려 하고, 나를 태우고 있어

en: I already know your type Think I play your cards right
ko: 네 타입은 이미 알아, 네가 여자들을 잘 다룬다고 생각해? 내가 할 수 있다는 걸 몰라?

en: Don't you know I could do this dance all night
ko: 내가 이 춤을 밤새 출 수 있다는 걸 몰라?
